metric: milliseconds from first contentful paint to window.__viz reporting ready

environment.cold_method: fresh browser process and context for every sample
environment.repeat_method: successive pages in one browser context after a priming load

changes: modulepreload starts both pinned CDN requests while the inline dataset downloads
Promise.all fetches and evaluates the two imports without an avoidable serial wait
after_optimization.range_rule: rounded outward around the cold p10-p90 interval
after_optimization.network_shape: Three.js and OrbitControls requests began within 0.3 ms of one another

limitations: This is a small single-location sample, not a universal latency guarantee.
CDN and connection variance can still produce waits outside the displayed range.
The loader shows elapsed time and a measured range, not a false-precision countdown.
After a successful visit, the page reports that browser's own previous observed load time.
